sacco

Class TextFileAnalyzer

  • java.lang.Object
    • sacco.TextFileAnalyzer

  • public class TextFileAnalyzer
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TextFileAnalyzer(java.lang.String fileName)
      Constructs a new TextFileAnalyzer object by loading the text file with the name passed in as a parameter.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getCharacterCount(java.lang.String letter)
      Counts the number of times the parameter String occurs in the loaded String.
      int getWordCount()
      Returns the word count of the loaded String as an int.
      void loadNewTextFile(java.lang.String fileName)
      Loads the text file with the name passed in as a parameter.
      java.lang.String toString()
      Returns the loaded String.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • TextFileAnalyzer

        public TextFileAnalyzer(java.lang.String fileName)
        Constructs a new TextFileAnalyzer object by loading the text file with the name passed in as a parameter. The text file must be in your project folder directly next to the .java files, not in any subfolders.
        Parameters:
        fileName - The name of the text file. It must include the extension .txt

    • Method Detail

      • loadNewTextFile

        public void loadNewTextFile(java.lang.String fileName)
        Loads the text file with the name passed in as a parameter. The previous text file is replaced. The text file must be in your project folder directly next to the .java files, not in any subfolders.
        Parameters:
        fileName - The name of the text file. It must include the extension .txt

      • getWordCount

        public int getWordCount()
        Returns the word count of the loaded String as an int.
        Returns:
        The word count of the loaded String

      • getCharacterCount

        public int getCharacterCount(java.lang.String letter)
        Counts the number of times the parameter String occurs in the loaded String. The parameter must be one character in length
        Parameters:
        letter - The character to be counted. Must be one character in length.
        Returns:

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Returns the loaded String. If no file has been loaded, the empty String will be returned "".
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
